2426 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2427
2428 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers))
2429 .close();
2430 if (withClaim)
2431 {
2432 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2433
2434 // submit a claim transaction with the wrong account (scGw
2435 // instead of scAlice)
2436 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scGw, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_BAD_CLAIM_ID)).close();
2437 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2438 }
2439 else
2440 {
2441 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_happened(amt, split_reward_quorum));
2442 }
2443 }
2444
2445 // Claim against a claim id with no attestations
2446 // ---------------------------------------------
2447 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2448 {
2449 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2450 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2451
2452 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2453
2454 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2455 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2456 .close()
2457 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2458 .close();
2459
2460 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2461 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2462 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2463 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2464
2465 BalanceTransfer transfer(scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, payees, withClaim);
2466
2467 // don't send any attestations
2468
2469 if (withClaim)
2470 {
2471 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2472
2473 // need to submit a claim transactions
2474 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_CLAIM_NO_QUORUM)).close();
2475 }
2476
2477 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2478 }
2479
2480 // Claim against a claim id with attestations, but not enough to
2481 // make a quorum
2482 // --------------------------------------------------------------------
2483 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2484 {
2485 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2486 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2487
2488 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2489
2490 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2491 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2492 .close()
2493 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2494 .close();
2495
2496 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2497 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2498 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2499 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2500
2501 BalanceTransfer transfer(scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, payees, withClaim);
2502
2503 auto tooFew = quorum - 1;
2504 scEnv
2505 .multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers, tooFew))
2506 .close();
2507 if (withClaim)
2508 {
2509 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2510
2511 // need to submit a claim transactions
2512 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_CLAIM_NO_QUORUM)).close();
2513 }
2514
2515 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2516 }
2517
2518 // Claim id of zero
2519 // ----------------
2520 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2521 {
2522 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2523 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2524
2525 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2526
2527 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2528 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2529 .close()
2530 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2531 .close();
2532
2533 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2534 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2535 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2536 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2537
2538 BalanceTransfer transfer(scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, payees, withClaim);
2539
2540 scEnv
2541 .multiTx(
2542 claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, 0, dst, signers),
2543 ter(tecXCHAIN_NO_CLAIM_ID))
2544 .close();
2545 if (withClaim)
2546 {
2547 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2548
2549 // need to submit a claim transactions
2550 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, 0, amt, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_NO_CLAIM_ID)).close();
2551 }
2552
2553 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2554 }
2555
2556 // Claim issue that does not match the expected issue on the bridge
2557 // (either LockingChainIssue or IssuingChainIssue, depending on the
2558 // chain). The claim id should already have enough attestations to
2559 // reach a quorum for this amount (for a different issuer).
2560 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
2561 for (auto withClaim : {true})
2562 {
2563 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2564 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2565
2566 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2567
2568 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2569 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2570 .close()
2571 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2572 .close();
2573
2574 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2575 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2576 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2577 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2578
2579 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2580 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2581
2582 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers))
2583 .close();
2584
2585 if (withClaim)
2586 {
2587 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2588
2589 // need to submit a claim transactions
2590 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, scUSD(1000), scBob), ter(temBAD_AMOUNT)).close();
2591 }
2592
2593 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2594 }
2595
2596 // Claim to a destination that does not already exist on the chain
2597 // -----------------------------------------------------------------
2598 for (auto withClaim : {true})
2599 {
2600 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2601 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2602
2603 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2604
2605 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2606 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2607 .close()
2608 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2609 .close();
2610
2611 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scuBob});
2612 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2613 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2614 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2615
2616 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2617 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2618
2619 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers))
2620 .close();
2621 if (withClaim)
2622 {
2623 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2624
2625 // need to submit a claim transactions
2626 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scuBob), ter(tecNO_DST)).close();
2627 }
2628
2629 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2630 }
2631
2632 // Claim where the claim id owner does not have enough XRP to pay
2633 // the reward
2634 // ------------------------------------------------------------------
2635 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2636 {
2637 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2638 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2639
2640 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2641 STAmount huge_reward{XRP(20000)};
2642 BEAST_EXPECT(huge_reward > scEnv.balance(scAlice));
2643
2644 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb, huge_reward))
2645 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2646 .close()
2647 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, huge_reward, mcAlice))
2648 .close();
2649
2650 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2651 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2652 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2653 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2654
2655 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2656 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2657
2658 if (withClaim)
2659 {
2660 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers))
2661 .close();
2662 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2663
2664 // need to submit a claim transactions
2665 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecUNFUNDED_PAYMENT)).close();
2666 }
2667 else
2668 {
2669 auto txns = claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers);
2670 for (int i = 0; i < UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1; ++i)
2671 {
2672 scEnv.tx(txns[i]).close();
2673 }
2674 scEnv.tx(txns.back());
2675 scEnv.close();
2676 // The attestation should succeed, because it adds an
2677 // attestation, but the claim should fail with insufficient
2678 // funds
2679 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecUNFUNDED_PAYMENT)).close();
2680 }
2681
2682 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2683 }
2684
2685 // Claim where the claim id owner has enough XRP to pay the reward,
2686 // but it would put his balance below the reserve
2687 // --------------------------------------------------------------------
2688 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2689 {
2690 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2691 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2692
2693 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2694
2695 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2696 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2697 .fund(
2698 res0 + reward,
2699 scuAlice) // just not enough because of fees
2700 .close()
2701 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scuAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice), ter(tecINSUFFICIENT_RESERVE))
2702 .close();
2703
2704 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2705 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2706 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2707 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2708
2709 BalanceTransfer transfer(scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scuAlice, payees, withClaim);
2710
2711 scEnv
2712 .tx(claim_attestation(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees[0], true, claimID, dst, signers[0]),
2713 ter(tecXCHAIN_NO_CLAIM_ID))
2714 .close();
2715 if (withClaim)
2716 {
2717 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2718
2719 // need to submit a claim transactions
2720 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scuAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_NO_CLAIM_ID)).close();
2721 }
2722
2723 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2724 }
2725
2726 // Pay to an account with deposit auth set
2727 // ---------------------------------------
2728 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2729 {
2730 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2731 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2732
2733 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2734
2735 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2736 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2737 .tx(fset("scBob", asfDepositAuth)) // set deposit auth
2738 .close()
2739 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2740 .close();
2741
2742 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2743 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2744 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2745 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2746
2747 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2748 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2749 auto txns = claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers);
2750 for (int i = 0; i < UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1; ++i)
2751 {
2752 scEnv.tx(txns[i]).close();
2753 }
2754 if (withClaim)
2755 {
2756 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2757
2758 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2759
2760 // need to submit a claim transactions
2761 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecNO_PERMISSION)).close();
2762
2763 // the transfer failed, but check that we can still use the
2764 // claimID with a different account
2765 Balance scCarol_bal(scEnv, scCarol);
2766
2767 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scCarol)).close();
2768 BEAST_EXPECT(scCarol_bal.diff() == amt);
2769 }
2770 else
2771 {
2772 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2773 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecNO_PERMISSION)).close();
2774 // A way would be to remove deposit auth and resubmit the
2775 // attestations (even though the witness servers won't do
2776 // it)
2777 scEnv
2778 .tx(fset("scBob", 0, asfDepositAuth)) // clear deposit auth
2779 .close();
2780
2781 Balance scBob_bal(scEnv, scBob);
2782 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2783 BEAST_EXPECT(scBob_bal.diff() == amt);
2784 }
2785 }
2786
2787 // Pay to an account with Destination Tag set
2788 // ------------------------------------------
2789 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2790 {
2791 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2792 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2793
2794 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2795
2796 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2797 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2798 .tx(fset("scBob", asfRequireDest)) // set dest tag
2799 .close()
2800 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2801 .close();
2802
2803 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2804 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2805 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2806 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2807
2808 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2809 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2810 auto txns = claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers);
2811 for (int i = 0; i < UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1; ++i)
2812 {
2813 scEnv.tx(txns[i]).close();
2814 }
2815 if (withClaim)
2816 {
2817 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2818 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2819
2820 // need to submit a claim transactions
2821 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecDST_TAG_NEEDED)).close();
2822
2823 // the transfer failed, but check that we can still use the
2824 // claimID with a different account
2825 Balance scCarol_bal(scEnv, scCarol);
2826
2827 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scCarol)).close();
2828 BEAST_EXPECT(scCarol_bal.diff() == amt);
2829 }
2830 else
2831 {
2832 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2833 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob), ter(tecDST_TAG_NEEDED)).close();
2834 // A way would be to remove the destination tag requirement
2835 // and resubmit the attestations (even though the witness
2836 // servers won't do it)
2837 scEnv
2838 .tx(fset("scBob", 0, asfRequireDest)) // clear dest tag
2839 .close();
2840
2841 Balance scBob_bal(scEnv, scBob);
2842
2843 scEnv.tx(txns.back()).close();
2844 BEAST_EXPECT(scBob_bal.diff() == amt);
2845 }
2846 }
2847
2848 // Pay to an account with deposit auth set. Check that the attestations
2849 // are still validated and that we can used the claimID to transfer the
2850 // funds to a different account (which doesn't have deposit auth set)
2851 // --------------------------------------------------------------------
2852 {
2853 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2854 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2855
2856 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2857
2858 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2859 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2860 .tx(fset("scBob", asfDepositAuth)) // set deposit auth
2861 .close()
2862 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2863 .close();
2864
2865 auto dst(std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2866 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2867 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2868 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2869
2870 // we should be able to submit the attestations, but the transfer
2871 // should not occur because dest account has deposit auth set
2872 Balance scBob_bal(scEnv, scBob);
2873
2874 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
2875 BEAST_EXPECT(scBob_bal.diff() == STAmount(0));
2876
2877 // Check that check that we still can use the claimID to transfer
2878 // the amount to a different account
2879 Balance scCarol_bal(scEnv, scCarol);
2880
2881 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scCarol)).close();
2882 BEAST_EXPECT(scCarol_bal.diff() == amt);
2883 }
2884
2885 // Claim where the amount different from what is attested to
2886 // ---------------------------------------------------------
2887 for (auto withClaim : {true})
2888 {
2889 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2890 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2891
2892 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2893
2894 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2895 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2896 .close()
2897 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2898 .close();
2899
2900 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2901 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2902 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2903 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2904
2905 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2906 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2907 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
2908 if (withClaim)
2909 {
2910 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2911
2912 // claim wrong amount
2913 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, one_xrp, scBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_CLAIM_NO_QUORUM)).close();
2914 }
2915
2916 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2917 }
2918
2919 // Verify that rewards are paid from the account that owns the claim
2920 // id
2921 // --------------------------------------------------------------------
2922 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2923 {
2924 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2925 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2926
2927 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
2928
2929 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
2930 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2931 .close()
2932 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
2933 .close();
2934
2935 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2936 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2937 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2938 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2939
2940 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2941 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2942 Balance scAlice_bal(scEnv, scAlice);
2943 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
2944
2945 STAmount claim_cost = reward;
2946
2947 if (withClaim)
2948 {
2949 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2950
2951 // need to submit a claim transactions
2952 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob)).close();
2953 claim_cost += tx_fee;
2954 }
2955
2956 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_happened(amt, split_reward_quorum));
2957 BEAST_EXPECT(scAlice_bal.diff() == -claim_cost); // because reward % 4 == 0
2958 }
2959
2960 // Verify that if a reward is not evenly divisible among the reward
2961 // accounts, the remaining amount goes to the claim id owner.
2962 // ----------------------------------------------------------------
2963 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
2964 {
2965 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
2966 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
2967
2968 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, tiny_reward)).close();
2969
2970 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb, tiny_reward))
2971 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
2972 .close()
2973 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, tiny_reward, mcAlice))
2974 .close();
2975
2976 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
2977 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
2978 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
2979 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
2980
2981 BalanceTransfer transfer(
2982 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM, withClaim);
2983 Balance scAlice_bal(scEnv, scAlice);
2984 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
2985 STAmount claim_cost = tiny_reward;
2986
2987 if (withClaim)
2988 {
2989 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
2990
2991 // need to submit a claim transactions
2992 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob)).close();
2993 claim_cost += tx_fee;
2994 }
2995
2996 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_happened(amt, tiny_reward_split));
2997 BEAST_EXPECT(scAlice_bal.diff() == -(claim_cost - tiny_reward_remainder));
2998 }
2999
3000 // If a reward distribution fails for one of the reward accounts
3001 // (the reward account doesn't exist or has deposit auth set), then
3002 // the txn should still succeed, but that portion should go to the
3003 // claim id owner.
3004 // -------------------------------------------------------------------
3005 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
3006 {
3007 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3008 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3009
3010 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
3011
3012 std::vector<Account> alt_payees{payees.begin(), payees.end() - 1};
3013 alt_payees.back() = Account("inexistent");
3014
3015 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
3016 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
3017 .close()
3018 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
3019 .close();
3020
3021 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
3022 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
3023 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
3024 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
3025
3026 BalanceTransfer transfer(
3027 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1, withClaim);
3028 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, alt_payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
3029
3030 if (withClaim)
3031 {
3032 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
3033
3034 // need to submit a claim transactions
3035 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob)).close();
3036 }
3037
3038 // this also checks that only 3 * split_reward was deducted from
3039 // scAlice (the payer account), since we passed alt_payees to
3040 // BalanceTransfer
3041 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_happened(amt, split_reward_quorum));
3042 }
3043
3044 for (auto withClaim : {false, true})
3045 {
3046 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3047 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3048
3049 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb)).close();
3050 auto& unpaid = payees[UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1];
3051 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
3052 .tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers))
3053 .tx(fset(unpaid, asfDepositAuth))
3054 .close()
3055 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
3056 .close();
3057
3058 auto dst(withClaim ? std::nullopt : std::optional<Account>{scBob});
3059 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
3060 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
3061 mcEnv.tx(xchain_commit(mcAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, dst)).close();
3062
3063 // balance of last signer should not change (has deposit auth)
3064 Balance last_signer(scEnv, unpaid);
3065
3066 // make sure all signers except the last one get the
3067 // split_reward
3068
3069 BalanceTransfer transfer(
3070 scEnv, Account::master, scBob, scAlice, &payees[0], UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM - 1, withClaim);
3071 scEnv.multiTx(claim_attestations(scAttester, jvb, mcAlice, amt, payees, true, claimID, dst, signers));
3072
3073 if (withClaim)
3074 {
3075 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_not_happened());
3076
3077 // need to submit a claim transactions
3078 scEnv.tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, claimID, amt, scBob)).close();
3079 }
3080
3081 // this also checks that only 3 * split_reward was deducted from
3082 // scAlice (the payer account), since we passed payees.size() -
3083 // 1 to BalanceTransfer
3084 BEAST_EXPECT(transfer.has_happened(amt, split_reward_quorum));
3085
3086 // and make sure the account with deposit auth received nothing
3087 BEAST_EXPECT(last_signer.diff() == STAmount(0));
3088 }
3089
3090 // coverage test: xchain_claim transaction with incorrect flag
3091 XEnv(*this, true)
3092 .tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
3093 .close()
3094 .tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, 1, XRP(1000), scBob), txflags(tfFillOrKill), ter(temINVALID_FLAG))
3095 .close();
3096
3097 // coverage test: xchain_claim transaction with xchain feature
3098 // disabled
3099 XEnv(*this, true)
3100 .tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
3101 .disableFeature(featureXChainBridge)
3102 .close()
3103 .tx(xchain_claim(scAlice, jvb, 1, XRP(1000), scBob), ter(temDISABLED))
3104 .close();
3105
3106 // coverage test: XChainClaim::preclaim - isLockingChain = true;
3107 XEnv(*this)
3108 .tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb))
3109 .close()
3110 .tx(xchain_claim(mcAlice, jvb, 1, XRP(1000), mcBob), ter(tecXCHAIN_NO_CLAIM_ID));
3111 }
3112
3113 void
3114 testXChainCreateAccount()
3115 {
3116 using namespace jtx;
3117
3118 testcase("Bridge Create Account");
3119 XRPAmount tx_fee = txFee();
3120
3121 // coverage test: transferHelper() - dst == src
3122 {
3123 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3124
3125 auto const amt = XRP(111);
3126 auto const amt_plus_reward = amt + reward;
3127
3128 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb)).tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers)).close();
3129
3130 Balance door(scEnv, Account::master);
3131
3132 // scEnv.tx(att_create_acct_batch1(1, amt,
3133 // Account::master)).close();
3134 scEnv.multiTx(att_create_acct_vec(1, amt, Account::master, 2)).close();
3135 BEAST_EXPECT(!!scEnv.caClaimID(jvb, 1)); // claim id present
3136 BEAST_EXPECT(scEnv.claimCount(jvb) == 0); // claim count is one less
3137
3138 // scEnv.tx(att_create_acct_batch2(1, amt,
3139 // Account::master)).close();
3140 scEnv.multiTx(att_create_acct_vec(1, amt, Account::master, 2, 2)).close();
3141 BEAST_EXPECT(!scEnv.caClaimID(jvb, 1)); // claim id deleted
3142 BEAST_EXPECT(scEnv.claimCount(jvb) == 1); // claim count was incremented
3143
3144 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == -reward);
3145 }
3146
3147 // Check that creating an account with less than the minimum create
3148 // amount fails.
3149 {
3150 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3151
3152 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3153
3154 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3155 Balance carol(mcEnv, mcCarol);
3156
3157 mcEnv
3158 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(19), reward),
3159 ter(tecXCHAIN_INSUFF_CREATE_AMOUNT))
3160 .close();
3161
3162 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3163 BEAST_EXPECT(carol.diff() == -tx_fee);
3164 }
3165
3166 // Check that creating an account with invalid flags fails.
3167 {
3168 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3169
3170 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3171
3172 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3173
3174 mcEnv
3175 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(20), reward),
3176 txflags(tfFillOrKill),
3177 ter(temINVALID_FLAG))
3178 .close();
3179
3180 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3181 }
3182
3183 // Check that creating an account with the XChainBridge feature
3184 // disabled fails.
3185 {
3186 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3187
3188 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3189
3190 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3191
3192 mcEnv.disableFeature(featureXChainBridge)
3193 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(20), reward), ter(temDISABLED))
3194 .close();
3195
3196 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3197 }
3198
3199 // Check that creating an account with a negative amount fails
3200 {
3201 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3202
3203 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3204
3205 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3206
3207 mcEnv.tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(-20), reward), ter(temBAD_AMOUNT))
3208 .close();
3209
3210 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3211 }
3212
3213 // Check that creating an account with a negative reward fails
3214 {
3215 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3216
3217 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3218
3219 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3220
3221 mcEnv.tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(20), XRP(-1)), ter(temBAD_AMOUNT))
3222 .close();
3223
3224 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3225 }
3226
3227 // Check that door account can't lock funds onto itself
3228 {
3229 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3230
3231 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3232
3233 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3234
3235 mcEnv
3236 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcDoor, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(20), XRP(1)), ter(tecXCHAIN_SELF_COMMIT))
3237 .close();
3238
3239 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == -tx_fee);
3240 }
3241
3242 // Check that reward matches the amount specified in bridge
3243 {
3244 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3245
3246 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(20))).close();
3247
3248 Balance door(mcEnv, mcDoor);
3249
3250 mcEnv
3251 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcCarol, jvb, scuAlice, XRP(20), XRP(2)),
3252 ter(tecXCHAIN_REWARD_MISMATCH))
3253 .close();
3254
3255 BEAST_EXPECT(door.diff() == STAmount(0));
3256 }
3257 }
3258
3259 void
3260 testFeeDipsIntoReserve()
3261 {
3262 using namespace jtx;
3263 XRPAmount res0 = reserve(0);
3264 XRPAmount tx_fee = txFee();
3265
3266 testcase("Fee dips into reserve");
3267
3268 // commit where the fee dips into the reserve, this should succeed
3269 XEnv(*this)
3270 .tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb))
3271 .fund(res0 + one_xrp + tx_fee - drops(1), mcuAlice)
3272 .close()
3273 .tx(xchain_commit(mcuAlice, jvb, 1, one_xrp, scBob), ter(tesSUCCESS));
3274
3275 // commit where the commit amount drips into the reserve, this should
3276 // fail
3277 XEnv(*this)
3278 .tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb))
3279 .fund(res0 + one_xrp - drops(1), mcuAlice)
3280 .close()
3281 .tx(xchain_commit(mcuAlice, jvb, 1, one_xrp, scBob), ter(tecUNFUNDED_PAYMENT));
3282
3283 auto const minAccountCreate = XRP(20);
3284
3285 // account create commit where the fee dips into the reserve,
3286 // this should succeed
3287 XEnv(*this)
3288 .tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, reward, minAccountCreate))
3289 .fund(res0 + tx_fee + minAccountCreate + reward - drops(1), mcuAlice)
3290 .close()
3291 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcuAlice, jvb, scuAlice, minAccountCreate, reward), ter(tesSUCCESS));
3292
3293 // account create commit where the commit dips into the reserve,
3294 // this should fail
3295 XEnv(*this)
3296 .tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, reward, minAccountCreate))
3297 .fund(res0 + minAccountCreate + reward - drops(1), mcuAlice)
3298 .close()
3299 .tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(mcuAlice, jvb, scuAlice, minAccountCreate, reward),
3300 ter(tecUNFUNDED_PAYMENT));
3301 }
3302
3303 void
3304 testXChainDeleteDoor()
3305 {
3306 using namespace jtx;
3307
3308 testcase("Bridge Delete Door Account");
3309
3310 auto const acctDelFee{drops(XEnv(*this).env_.current()->fees().increment)};
3311
3312 // Deleting an account that owns bridge should fail
3313 {
3314 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
3315
3316 mcEnv.tx(create_bridge(mcDoor, jvb, XRP(1), XRP(1))).close();
3317
3318 // We don't allow an account to be deleted if its sequence
3319 // number is within 256 of the current ledger.
3320 for (size_t i = 0; i < 256; ++i)
3321 mcEnv.close();
3322
3323 // try to delete mcDoor, send funds to mcAlice
3324 mcEnv.tx(acctdelete(mcDoor, mcAlice), fee(acctDelFee), ter(tecHAS_OBLIGATIONS));
3325 }
3326
3327 // Deleting an account that owns a claim id should fail
3328 {
3329 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3330
3331 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb))
3332 .close()
3333 .tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice))
3334 .close();
3335
3336 // We don't allow an account to be deleted if its sequence
3337 // number is within 256 of the current ledger.
3338 for (size_t i = 0; i < 256; ++i)
3339 scEnv.close();
3340
3341 // try to delete scAlice, send funds to scBob
3342 scEnv.tx(acctdelete(scAlice, scBob), fee(acctDelFee), ter(tecHAS_OBLIGATIONS));
3343 }
3344 }
3345
3346 void
3347 testBadPublicKey()
3348 {
3349 using namespace jtx;
3350
3351 testcase("Bad attestations");
3352 {
3353 // Create a bridge and add an attestation with a bad public key
3354 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3355 std::uint32_t const claimID = 1;
3356 std::optional<Account> dst{scBob};
3357 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
3358 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb)).tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers)).close();
3359 scEnv.tx(xchain_create_claim_id(scAlice, jvb, reward, mcAlice)).close();
3360 auto jvAtt = claim_attestation(
3361 scAttester,
3362 jvb,
3363 mcAlice,
3364 amt,
3365 payees[UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM],
3366 true,
3367 claimID,
3368 dst,
3369 signers[UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM]);
3370 {
3371 // Change to an invalid keytype
3372 auto k = jvAtt["PublicKey"].asString();
3373 k.at(1) = '9';
3374 jvAtt["PublicKey"] = k;
3375 }
3376 scEnv.tx(jvAtt, ter(temMALFORMED)).close();
3377 }
3378 {
3379 // Create a bridge and add an create account attestation with a bad
3380 // public key
3381 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
3382 std::uint32_t const createCount = 1;
3383 Account dst{scBob};
3384 auto const amt = XRP(1000);
3385 auto const rewardAmt = XRP(1);
3386 scEnv.tx(create_bridge(Account::master, jvb)).tx(jtx::signers(Account::master, quorum, signers)).close();
3387 auto jvAtt = create_account_attestation(
3388 scAttester,
3389 jvb,
3390 mcAlice,
3391 amt,
3392 rewardAmt,
3393 payees[UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM],
3394 true,
3395 createCount,
3396 dst,
3397 signers[UT_XCHAIN_DEFAULT_QUORUM]);
3398 {
3399 // Change to an invalid keytype
3400 auto k = jvAtt["PublicKey"].asString();
3401 k.at(1) = '9';
3402 jvAtt["PublicKey"] = k;
3403 }
3404 scEnv.tx(jvAtt, ter(temMALFORMED)).close();
3405 }
3406 }
3407
3408 void
3409 run() override
3410 {
3411 testXChainBridgeExtraFields();
3412 testXChainCreateBridge();
3413 testXChainBridgeCreateConstraints();
3414 testXChainCreateBridgeMatrix();
3415 testXChainModifyBridge();
3416 testXChainCreateClaimID();
3417 testXChainCommit();
3418 testXChainAddAttestation();
3419 testXChainAddClaimNonBatchAttestation();
3420 testXChainAddAccountCreateNonBatchAttestation(); // cspell: disable-line
3421 testXChainClaim();
3422 testXChainCreateAccount();
3423 testFeeDipsIntoReserve();
3424 testXChainDeleteDoor();
3425 testBadPublicKey();
3426 }
3427};
3428
3429// -----------------------------------------------------------
3430// -----------------------------------------------------------
3431struct XChainSim_test : public beast::unit_test::suite, public jtx::XChainBridgeObjects
3432{
3433private:
3434 static constexpr size_t num_signers = 5;
3435
3436 // --------------------------------------------------
3437 enum class WithClaim { no, yes };
3438 struct Transfer
3439 {
3440 jtx::Account from;
3441 jtx::Account to;
3442 jtx::Account finaldest;
3443 STAmount amt;
3444 bool a2b; // direction of transfer
3445 WithClaim with_claim{WithClaim::no};
3446 uint32_t claim_id{0};
3447 std::array<bool, num_signers> attested{};
3448 };
3449
3450 struct AccountCreate
3451 {
3452 jtx::Account from;
3453 jtx::Account to;
3454 STAmount amt;
3455 STAmount reward;
3456 bool a2b;
3457 uint32_t claim_id{0};
3458 std::array<bool, num_signers> attested{};
3459 };
3460
3461 using ENV = XEnv<XChainSim_test>;
3462 using BridgeID = BridgeDef const*;
3463
3464 // tracking chain state
3465 // --------------------
3466 struct AccountStateTrack
3467 {
3468 STAmount startAmount{0};
3469 STAmount expectedDiff{0};
3470
3471 void
3472 init(ENV& env, jtx::Account const& acct)
3473 {
3474 startAmount = env.balance(acct);
3475 expectedDiff = STAmount(0);
3476 }
3477
3478 bool
3479 verify(ENV& env, jtx::Account const& acct) const
3480 {
3481 STAmount diff{env.balance(acct) - startAmount};
3482 bool check = diff == expectedDiff;
3483 return check;
3484 }
3485 };
3486
3487 // --------------------------------------------------
3488 struct ChainStateTrack
3489 {
3490 using ClaimVec = jtx::JValueVec;
3491 using CreateClaimVec = jtx::JValueVec;
3492 using CreateClaimMap = std::map<uint32_t, CreateClaimVec>;
3493
3494 ChainStateTrack(ENV& env) : env(env), tx_fee(env.env_.current()->fees().base)
3495 {
3496 }
3497
3498 void
3499 sendAttestations(size_t signer_idx, BridgeID bridge, ClaimVec& claims)
3500 {
3501 for (auto const& c : claims)
3502 {
3503 env.tx(c).close();
3504 spendFee(bridge->signers[signer_idx].account);
3505 }
3506 claims.clear();
3507 }
3508
3509 uint32_t
3510 sendCreateAttestations(size_t signer_idx, BridgeID bridge, CreateClaimVec& claims)
3511 {
3512 size_t num_successful = 0;
3513 for (auto const& c : claims)
3514 {
3515 env.tx(c).close();
3516 if (env.ter() == tesSUCCESS)
3517 {
3518 counters[bridge].signers.push_back(signer_idx);
3519 num_successful++;
3520 }
3521 spendFee(bridge->signers[signer_idx].account);
3522 }
3523 claims.clear();
3524 return num_successful;
3525 }
3526
3527 void
3528 sendAttestations()
3529 {
3530 bool callback_called;
3531
3532 // we have this "do {} while" loop because we want to process
3533 // all the account create which can reach quorum at this time
3534 // stamp.
3535 do
3536 {
3537 callback_called = false;
3538 // cspell: ignore attns
3539 for (size_t i = 0; i < signers_attns.size(); ++i)
3540 {
3541 for (auto& [bridge, claims] : signers_attns[i])
3542 {
3543 sendAttestations(i, bridge, claims.xfer_claims);
3544
3545 auto& c = counters[bridge];
3546 auto& create_claims = claims.create_claims[c.claim_count];
3547 auto num_attns = create_claims.size();
3548 if (num_attns)
3549 {
3550 c.num_create_attn_sent += sendCreateAttestations(i, bridge, create_claims);
3551 }
3552 assert(claims.create_claims[c.claim_count].empty());
3553 }
3554 }
3555 for (auto& [bridge, c] : counters)
3556 {
3557 if (c.num_create_attn_sent >= bridge->quorum)
3558 {
3559 callback_called = true;
3560 c.create_callbacks[c.claim_count](c.signers);
3561 ++c.claim_count;
3562 c.num_create_attn_sent = 0;
3563 c.signers.clear();
3564 }
3565 }
3566 } while (callback_called);
3567 }
3568
3569 void
3570 init(jtx::Account const& acct)
3571 {
3572 accounts[acct].init(env, acct);
3573 }
3574
3575 void
3576 receive(jtx::Account const& acct, STAmount amt, std::uint64_t divisor = 1)
3577 {
3578 if (amt.issue() != xrpIssue())
3579 return;
3580 auto it = accounts.find(acct);
3581 if (it == accounts.end())
3582 {
3583 accounts[acct].init(env, acct);
3584 // we just looked up the account, so expectedDiff == 0
3585 }
3586 else
3587 {
3588 it->second.expectedDiff +=
3589 (divisor == 1 ? amt : divide(amt, STAmount(amt.issue(), divisor), amt.issue()));
3590 }
3591 }
3592
3593 void
3594 spend(jtx::Account const& acct, STAmount amt, std::uint64_t times = 1)
3595 {
3596 if (amt.issue() != xrpIssue())
3597 return;
3598 receive(acct, times == 1 ? -amt : -multiply(amt, STAmount(amt.issue(), times), amt.issue()));
3599 }
3600
3601 void
3602 transfer(jtx::Account const& from, jtx::Account const& to, STAmount amt)
3603 {
3604 spend(from, amt);
3605 receive(to, amt);
3606 }
3607
3608 void
3609 spendFee(jtx::Account const& acct, size_t times = 1)
3610 {
3611 spend(acct, tx_fee, times);
3612 }
3613
3614 bool
3615 verify() const
3616 {
3617 for (auto const& [acct, state] : accounts)
3618 if (!state.verify(env, acct))
3619 return false;
3620 return true;
3621 }
3622
3623 struct BridgeCounters
3624 {
3625 using complete_cb = std::function<void(std::vector<size_t> const& signers)>;
3626
3627 uint32_t claim_id{0};
3628 uint32_t create_count{0}; // for account create. First should be 1
3629 uint32_t claim_count{0}; // for account create. Increments after quorum for
3630 // current create_count (starts at 1) is reached.
3631
3632 uint32_t num_create_attn_sent{0}; // for current claim_count
3633 std::vector<size_t> signers;
3634 std::vector<complete_cb> create_callbacks;
3635 };
3636
3637 struct Claims
3638 {
3639 ClaimVec xfer_claims;
3640 CreateClaimMap create_claims;
3641 };
3642
3643 using SignerAttns = std::unordered_map<BridgeID, Claims>;
3644 using SignersAttns = std::array<SignerAttns, num_signers>;
3645
3646 ENV& env;
3647 std::map<jtx::Account, AccountStateTrack> accounts;
3648 SignersAttns signers_attns;
3649 std::map<BridgeID, BridgeCounters> counters;
3650 STAmount tx_fee;
3651 };
3652
3653 struct ChainStateTracker
3654 {
3655 ChainStateTracker(ENV& a_env, ENV& b_env) : a_(a_env), b_(b_env)
3656 {
3657 }
3658
3659 bool
3660 verify() const
3661 {
3662 return a_.verify() && b_.verify();
3663 }
3664
3665 void
3666 sendAttestations()
3667 {
3668 a_.sendAttestations();
3669 b_.sendAttestations();
3670 }
3671
3672 void
3673 init(jtx::Account const& acct)
3674 {
3675 a_.init(acct);
3676 b_.init(acct);
3677 }
3678
3679 ChainStateTrack a_;
3680 ChainStateTrack b_;
3681 };
3682
3683 enum SmState {
3684 st_initial,
3685 st_claim_id_created,
3686 st_attesting,
3687 st_attested,
3688 st_completed,
3689 st_closed,
3690 };
3691
3692 enum Act_Flags { af_a2b = 1 << 0 };
3693
3694 // --------------------------------------------------
3695 template <class T>
3696 class SmBase
3697 {
3698 public:
3699 SmBase(std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& chainstate, BridgeDef const& bridge)
3700 : bridge_(bridge), st_(chainstate)
3701 {
3702 }
3703
3704 ChainStateTrack&
3705 srcState()
3706 {
3707 return static_cast<T&>(*this).a2b() ? st_->a_ : st_->b_;
3708 }
3709
3710 ChainStateTrack&
3711 destState()
3712 {
3713 return static_cast<T&>(*this).a2b() ? st_->b_ : st_->a_;
3714 }
3715
3716 jtx::Account const&
3717 srcDoor()
3718 {
3719 return static_cast<T&>(*this).a2b() ? bridge_.doorA : bridge_.doorB;
3720 }
3721
3722 jtx::Account const&
3723 dstDoor()
3724 {
3725 return static_cast<T&>(*this).a2b() ? bridge_.doorB : bridge_.doorA;
3726 }
3727
3728 protected:
3729 BridgeDef const& bridge_;
3730 std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> st_;
3731 };
3732
3733 // --------------------------------------------------
3734 class SmCreateAccount : public SmBase<SmCreateAccount>
3735 {
3736 public:
3737 using Base = SmBase<SmCreateAccount>;
3738
3739 SmCreateAccount(
3740 std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& chainstate,
3741 BridgeDef const& bridge,
3742 AccountCreate create)
3743 : Base(chainstate, bridge), sm_state(st_initial), cr(std::move(create))
3744 {
3745 }
3746
3747 bool
3748 a2b() const
3749 {
3750 return cr.a2b;
3751 }
3752
3753 uint32_t
3754 issue_account_create()
3755 {
3756 ChainStateTrack& st = srcState();
3757 jtx::Account const& srcdoor = srcDoor();
3758
3759 st.env.tx(sidechain_xchain_account_create(cr.from, bridge_.jvb, cr.to, cr.amt, cr.reward))
3760 .close(); // needed for claim_id sequence to be correct'
3761 st.spendFee(cr.from);
3762 st.transfer(cr.from, srcdoor, cr.amt);
3763 st.transfer(cr.from, srcdoor, cr.reward);
3764
3765 return ++st.counters[&bridge_].create_count;
3766 }
3767
3768 void
3769 attest(uint64_t time, uint32_t rnd)
3770 {
3771 ChainStateTrack& st = destState();
3772
3773 // check all signers, but start at a random one
3774 size_t i;
3775 for (i = 0; i < num_signers; ++i)
3776 {
3777 size_t signer_idx = (rnd + i) % num_signers;
3778
3779 if (!(cr.attested[signer_idx]))
3780 {
3781 // enqueue one attestation for this signer
3782 cr.attested[signer_idx] = true;
3783
3784 st.signers_attns[signer_idx][&bridge_].create_claims[cr.claim_id - 1].emplace_back(
3785 create_account_attestation(
3786 bridge_.signers[signer_idx].account,
3787 bridge_.jvb,
3788 cr.from,
3789 cr.amt,
3790 cr.reward,
3791 bridge_.signers[signer_idx].account,
3792 cr.a2b,
3793 cr.claim_id,
3794 cr.to,
3795 bridge_.signers[signer_idx]));
3796 break;
3797 }
3798 }
3799
3800 if (i == num_signers)
3801 return; // did not attest
3802
3803 auto& counters = st.counters[&bridge_];
3804 if (counters.create_callbacks.size() < cr.claim_id)
3805 counters.create_callbacks.resize(cr.claim_id);
3806
3807 auto complete_cb = [&](std::vector<size_t> const& signers) {
3808 auto num_attestors = signers.size();
3809 st.env.close();
3810 assert(num_attestors <= std::count(cr.attested.begin(), cr.attested.end(), true));
3811 assert(num_attestors >= bridge_.quorum);
3812 assert(cr.claim_id - 1 == counters.claim_count);
3813
3814 auto r = cr.reward;
3815 auto reward = divide(r, STAmount(num_attestors), r.issue());
3816
3817 for (auto i : signers)
3818 st.receive(bridge_.signers[i].account, reward);
3819
3820 st.spend(dstDoor(), reward, num_attestors);
3821 st.transfer(dstDoor(), cr.to, cr.amt);
3822 st.env.env_.memoize(cr.to);
3823 sm_state = st_completed;
3824 };
3825
3826 counters.create_callbacks[cr.claim_id - 1] = std::move(complete_cb);
3827 }
3828
3829 SmState
3830 advance(uint64_t time, uint32_t rnd)
3831 {
3832 switch (sm_state)
3833 {
3834 case st_initial:
3835 cr.claim_id = issue_account_create();
3836 sm_state = st_attesting;
3837 break;
3838
3839 case st_attesting:
3840 attest(time, rnd);
3841 break;
3842
3843 default:
3844 assert(0);
3845 break;
3846
3847 case st_completed:
3848 break; // will get this once
3849 }
3850 return sm_state;
3851 }
3852
3853 private:
3854 SmState sm_state;
3855 AccountCreate cr;
3856 };
3857
3858 // --------------------------------------------------
3859 class SmTransfer : public SmBase<SmTransfer>
3860 {
3861 public:
3862 using Base = SmBase<SmTransfer>;
3863
3864 SmTransfer(std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& chainstate, BridgeDef const& bridge, Transfer xfer)
3865 : Base(chainstate, bridge), xfer(std::move(xfer)), sm_state(st_initial)
3866 {
3867 }
3868
3869 bool
3870 a2b() const
3871 {
3872 return xfer.a2b;
3873 }
3874
3875 uint32_t
3876 create_claim_id()
3877 {
3878 ChainStateTrack& st = destState();
3879
3880 st.env.tx(xchain_create_claim_id(xfer.to, bridge_.jvb, bridge_.reward, xfer.from))
3881 .close(); // needed for claim_id sequence to be
3882 // correct'
3883 st.spendFee(xfer.to);
3884 return ++st.counters[&bridge_].claim_id;
3885 }
3886
3887 void
3888 commit()
3889 {
3890 ChainStateTrack& st = srcState();
3891 jtx::Account const& srcdoor = srcDoor();
3892
3893 if (xfer.amt.issue() != xrpIssue())
3894 {
3895 st.env.tx(pay(srcdoor, xfer.from, xfer.amt));
3896 st.spendFee(srcdoor);
3897 }
3898 st.env.tx(xchain_commit(
3899 xfer.from,
3900 bridge_.jvb,
3901 xfer.claim_id,
3902 xfer.amt,
3903 xfer.with_claim == WithClaim::yes ? std::nullopt : std::optional<jtx::Account>(xfer.finaldest)));
3904 st.spendFee(xfer.from);
3905 st.transfer(xfer.from, srcdoor, xfer.amt);
3906 }
3907
3908 void
3909 distribute_reward(ChainStateTrack& st)
3910 {
3911 auto r = bridge_.reward;
3912 auto reward = divide(r, STAmount(bridge_.quorum), r.issue());
3913
3914 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_signers; ++i)
3915 {
3916 if (xfer.attested[i])
3917 st.receive(bridge_.signers[i].account, reward);
3918 }
3919 st.spend(xfer.to, reward, bridge_.quorum);
3920 }
3921
3922 bool
3923 attest(uint64_t time, uint32_t rnd)
3924 {
3925 ChainStateTrack& st = destState();
3926
3927 // check all signers, but start at a random one
3928 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_signers; ++i)
3929 {
3930 size_t signer_idx = (rnd + i) % num_signers;
3931 if (!(xfer.attested[signer_idx]))
3932 {
3933 // enqueue one attestation for this signer
3934 xfer.attested[signer_idx] = true;
3935
3936 st.signers_attns[signer_idx][&bridge_].xfer_claims.emplace_back(claim_attestation(
3937 bridge_.signers[signer_idx].account,
3938 bridge_.jvb,
3939 xfer.from,
3940 xfer.amt,
3941 bridge_.signers[signer_idx].account,
3942 xfer.a2b,
3943 xfer.claim_id,
3944 xfer.with_claim == WithClaim::yes ? std::nullopt : std::optional<jtx::Account>(xfer.finaldest),
3945 bridge_.signers[signer_idx]));
3946 break;
3947 }
3948 }
3949
3950 // return true if quorum was reached, false otherwise
3951 bool quorum = std::count(xfer.attested.begin(), xfer.attested.end(), true) >= bridge_.quorum;
3952 if (quorum && xfer.with_claim == WithClaim::no)
3953 {
3954 distribute_reward(st);
3955 st.transfer(dstDoor(), xfer.finaldest, xfer.amt);
3956 }
3957 return quorum;
3958 }
3959
3960 void
3961 claim()
3962 {
3963 ChainStateTrack& st = destState();
3964 st.env.tx(xchain_claim(xfer.to, bridge_.jvb, xfer.claim_id, xfer.amt, xfer.finaldest));
3965 distribute_reward(st);
3966 st.transfer(dstDoor(), xfer.finaldest, xfer.amt);
3967 st.spendFee(xfer.to);
3968 }
3969
3970 SmState
3971 advance(uint64_t time, uint32_t rnd)
3972 {
3973 switch (sm_state)
3974 {
3975 case st_initial:
3976 xfer.claim_id = create_claim_id();
3977 sm_state = st_claim_id_created;
3978 break;
3979
3980 case st_claim_id_created:
3981 commit();
3982 sm_state = st_attesting;
3983 break;
3984
3985 case st_attesting:
3986 sm_state = attest(time, rnd) ? (xfer.with_claim == WithClaim::yes ? st_attested : st_completed)
3987 : st_attesting;
3988 break;
3989
3990 case st_attested:
3991 assert(xfer.with_claim == WithClaim::yes);
3992 claim();
3993 sm_state = st_completed;
3994 break;
3995
3996 default:
3997 case st_completed:
3998 assert(0); // should have been removed
3999 break;
4000 }
4001 return sm_state;
4002 }
4003
4004 private:
4005 Transfer xfer;
4006 SmState sm_state;
4007 };
4008
4009 // --------------------------------------------------
4010 using Sm = std::variant<SmCreateAccount, SmTransfer>;
4011 using SmCont = std::list<std::pair<uint64_t, Sm>>;
4012
4013 SmCont sm_;
4014
4015 void
4016 xfer(
4017 uint64_t time,
4018 std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& chainstate,
4019 BridgeDef const& bridge,
4020 Transfer transfer)
4021 {
4022 sm_.emplace_back(time, SmTransfer(chainstate, bridge, std::move(transfer)));
4023 }
4024
4025 void
4026 ac(uint64_t time, std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& chainstate, BridgeDef const& bridge, AccountCreate ac)
4027 {
4028 sm_.emplace_back(time, SmCreateAccount(chainstate, bridge, std::move(ac)));
4029 }
4030
4031public:
4032 void
4033 runSimulation(std::shared_ptr<ChainStateTracker> const& st, bool verify_balances = true)
4034 {
4035 using namespace jtx;
4036 uint64_t time = 0;
4037 std::mt19937 gen(27); // Standard mersenne_twister_engine
4038 std::uniform_int_distribution<uint32_t> distrib(0, 9);
4039
4040 while (!sm_.empty())
4041 {
4042 ++time;
4043 for (auto it = sm_.begin(); it != sm_.end();)
4044 {
4045 auto vis = [&](auto& sm) {
4046 uint32_t rnd = distrib(gen);
4047 return sm.advance(time, rnd);
4048 };
4049 auto& [t, sm] = *it;
4050 if (t <= time && std::visit(vis, sm) == st_completed)
4051 it = sm_.erase(it);
4052 else
4053 ++it;
4054 }
4055
4056 // send attestations
4057 st->sendAttestations();
4058
4059 // make sure all transactions have been applied
4060 st->a_.env.close();
4061 st->b_.env.close();
4062
4063 if (verify_balances)
4064 {
4065 BEAST_EXPECT(st->verify());
4066 }
4067 }
4068 }
4069
4070 void
4071 testXChainSimulation()
4072 {
4073 using namespace jtx;
4074
4075 testcase("Bridge usage simulation");
4076
4077 XEnv mcEnv(*this);
4078 XEnv scEnv(*this, true);
4079
4080 auto st = std::make_shared<ChainStateTracker>(mcEnv, scEnv);
4081
4082 // create 10 accounts + door funded on both chains, and store
4083 // in ChainStateTracker the initial amount of these accounts
4084 Account doorXRPLocking("doorXRPLocking"), doorUSDLocking("doorUSDLocking"), doorUSDIssuing("doorUSDIssuing");
4085
4086 constexpr size_t num_acct = 10;
4087 auto a = [&doorXRPLocking, &doorUSDLocking, &doorUSDIssuing]() {
4088 using namespace std::literals;
4089 std::vector<Account> result;
4090 result.reserve(num_acct);
4091 for (int i = 0; i < num_acct; ++i)
4092 result.emplace_back("a"s + std::to_string(i), (i % 2) ? KeyType::ed25519 : KeyType::secp256k1);
4093 result.emplace_back("doorXRPLocking");
4094 doorXRPLocking = result.back();
4095 result.emplace_back("doorUSDLocking");
4096 doorUSDLocking = result.back();
4097 result.emplace_back("doorUSDIssuing");
4098 doorUSDIssuing = result.back();
4099 return result;
4100 }();
4101
4102 for (auto& acct : a)
4103 {
4104 STAmount amt{XRP(100000)};
4105
4106 mcEnv.fund(amt, acct);
4107 scEnv.fund(amt, acct);
4108 }
4109 Account USDLocking{"USDLocking"};
4110 IOU usdLocking{USDLocking["USD"]};
4111 IOU usdIssuing{doorUSDIssuing["USD"]};
4112
4113 mcEnv.fund(XRP(100000), USDLocking);
4114 mcEnv.close();
4115 mcEnv.tx(trust(doorUSDLocking, usdLocking(100000)));
4116 mcEnv.close();
4117 mcEnv.tx(pay(USDLocking, doorUSDLocking, usdLocking(50000)));
4118
4119 for (int i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i)
4120 {
4121 auto& acct{a[i]};
4122 if (i < num_acct)
4123 {
4124 mcEnv.tx(trust(acct, usdLocking(100000)));
4125 scEnv.tx(trust(acct, usdIssuing(100000)));
4126 }
4127 st->init(acct);
4128 }
4129 for (auto& s : signers)
4130 st->init(s.account);
4131
4132 st->b_.init(Account::master);
4133
4134 // also create some unfunded accounts
4135 constexpr size_t num_ua = 20;
4136 auto ua = []() {
4137 using namespace std::literals;
4138 std::vector<Account> result;
4139 result.reserve(num_ua);
4140 for (int i = 0; i < num_ua; ++i)
4141 result.emplace_back("ua"s + std::to_string(i), (i % 2) ? KeyType::ed25519 : KeyType::secp256k1);
4142 return result;
4143 }();
4144
4145 // initialize a bridge from a BridgeDef
4146 auto initBridge = [&mcEnv, &scEnv, &st](BridgeDef& bd) {
4147 bd.initBridge(mcEnv, scEnv);
4148 st->a_.spendFee(bd.doorA, 2);
4149 st->b_.spendFee(bd.doorB, 2);
4150 };
4151
4152 // create XRP -> XRP bridge
4153 // ------------------------
4154 BridgeDef xrp_b{
4155 doorXRPLocking, xrpIssue(), Account::master, xrpIssue(), XRP(1), XRP(20), quorum, signers, Json::nullValue};
4156
4157 initBridge(xrp_b);
4158
4159 // create USD -> USD bridge
4160 // ------------------------
4161 BridgeDef usd_b{
4162 doorUSDLocking, usdLocking, doorUSDIssuing, usdIssuing, XRP(1), XRP(20), quorum, signers, Json::nullValue};
4163
4164 initBridge(usd_b);
4165
4166 // try a single account create + transfer to validate the simulation
4167 // engine. Do the transfer 8 time steps after the account create, to
4168 // give time enough for ua[0] to be funded now so it can reserve
4169 // the claimID
4170 // -----------------------------------------------------------------
4171 ac(0, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[0], XRP(777), xrp_b.reward, true});
4172 xfer(8, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[0], a[2], XRP(3), true});
4173 runSimulation(st);
4174
4175 // try the same thing in the other direction
4176 // -----------------------------------------
4177 ac(0, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[0], XRP(777), xrp_b.reward, false});
4178 xfer(8, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[0], a[2], XRP(3), false});
4179 runSimulation(st);
4180
4181 // run multiple XRP transfers
4182 // --------------------------
4183 xfer(0, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], XRP(6), true, WithClaim::no});
4184 xfer(1, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], XRP(8), false, WithClaim::no});
4185 xfer(1, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], XRP(1), true});
4186 xfer(2, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], XRP(3), false});
4187 xfer(2, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], XRP(5), false});
4188 xfer(2, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], XRP(7), false, WithClaim::no});
4189 xfer(2, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], XRP(9), true});
4190 runSimulation(st);
4191
4192 // run one USD transfer
4193 // --------------------
4194 xfer(0, st, usd_b, {a[0], a[1], a[2], usdLocking(3), true});
4195 runSimulation(st);
4196
4197 // run multiple USD transfers
4198 // --------------------------
4199 xfer(0, st, usd_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], usdLocking(6), true});
4200 xfer(1, st, usd_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], usdIssuing(8), false});
4201 xfer(1, st, usd_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], usdLocking(1), true});
4202 xfer(2, st, usd_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], usdIssuing(3), false});
4203 xfer(2, st, usd_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], usdIssuing(5), false});
4204 xfer(2, st, usd_b, {a[0], a[0], a[1], usdIssuing(7), false});
4205 xfer(2, st, usd_b, {a[1], a[1], a[1], usdLocking(9), true});
4206 runSimulation(st);
4207
4208 // run mixed transfers
4209 // -------------------
4210 xfer(0, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[0], XRP(1), true});
4211 xfer(0, st, usd_b, {a[1], a[3], a[3], usdIssuing(3), false});
4212 xfer(0, st, usd_b, {a[3], a[2], a[1], usdIssuing(5), false});
4213
4214 xfer(1, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[0], a[0], XRP(4), false});
4215 xfer(1, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[0], XRP(8), true});
4216 xfer(1, st, usd_b, {a[4], a[1], a[1], usdLocking(7), true});
4217
4218 xfer(3, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[0], XRP(7), true});
4219 xfer(3, st, xrp_b, {a[0], a[4], a[3], XRP(2), false});
4220 xfer(3, st, xrp_b, {a[1], a[1], a[0], XRP(9), true});
4221 xfer(3, st, usd_b, {a[3], a[1], a[1], usdIssuing(11), false});
4222 runSimulation(st);
4223
4224 // run multiple account create to stress attestation batching
4225 // ----------------------------------------------------------
4226 ac(0, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[1], XRP(301), xrp_b.reward, true});
4227 ac(0, st, xrp_b, {a[1], ua[2], XRP(302), xrp_b.reward, true});
4228 ac(1, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[3], XRP(303), xrp_b.reward, true});
4229 ac(2, st, xrp_b, {a[1], ua[4], XRP(304), xrp_b.reward, true});
4230 ac(3, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[5], XRP(305), xrp_b.reward, true});
4231 ac(4, st, xrp_b, {a[1], ua[6], XRP(306), xrp_b.reward, true});
4232 ac(6, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[7], XRP(307), xrp_b.reward, true});
4233 ac(7, st, xrp_b, {a[2], ua[8], XRP(308), xrp_b.reward, true});
4234 ac(9, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[9], XRP(309), xrp_b.reward, true});
4235 ac(9, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[9], XRP(309), xrp_b.reward, true});
4236 ac(10, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[10], XRP(310), xrp_b.reward, true});
4237 ac(12, st, xrp_b, {a[0], ua[11], XRP(311), xrp_b.reward, true});
4238 ac(12, st, xrp_b, {a[3], ua[12], XRP(312), xrp_b.reward, true});
4239 ac(12, st, xrp_b, {a[4], ua[13], XRP(313), xrp_b.reward, true});
4240 ac(12, st, xrp_b, {a[3], ua[14], XRP(314), xrp_b.reward, true});
4241 ac(12, st, xrp_b, {a[6], ua[15], XRP(315), xrp_b.reward, true});
4242 ac(13, st, xrp_b, {a[7], ua[16], XRP(316), xrp_b.reward, true});
4243 ac(15, st, xrp_b, {a[3], ua[17], XRP(317), xrp_b.reward, true});
4244 runSimulation(st, true); // balances verification working now.
4245 }
4246
4247 void
4248 run() override
4249 {
4250 testXChainSimulation();
4251 }
4252};
4253
4254BEAST_DEFINE_TESTSUITE(XChain, app, xrpl);
4255BEAST_DEFINE_TESTSUITE(XChainSim, app, xrpl);
4256
4257} // namespace xrpl::test
